text: My app won’t load at all, it’s just blank. Help?
i ordered a blender like, a week ago and still no tracking info? also, why is my order number not working?? so confused!
I’m really confused about the plan options. Like, are they all the same? I thought I picked one but now it feels different? I’m not sure what’s really going on, can someone help?
I tried to get my money back but the thing is... I don’t remember if I did it right. Can someone check? Also, I might have missed somethin'

I've been a customer for a while, but I recently noticed that my last two orders were missing items. It's frustrating because I rely on my orders being complete. Can you please look into this and let me know why it's happening? I really don't want to keep having to deal with these issues every time I order something.
I thought I ordered a medium shirt but got a small. Like, how did that even happen? I want my money back, not a replacement or anything.

I’m really frustrated because I was promised a response within 48 hours regarding my account issue, but it’s now been nearly a week, and I've been checking my account status obsessively, even during my lunch breaks at work. It’s beyond inconvenient as I rely on your services for my daily tasks. I hope you can address this matter promptly since it’s affecting my productivity and I simply cannot afford further delays.
I seem to be experiencing some issues with the application. It keeps crashing unexpectedly, and I'm not exactly sure why. Any guidance would be appreciated.
I’ve been trying to use the app, but it just keeps crashing nonstop! It’s really frustrating and I can't even explain what happens. Can someone help me figure this out? I feel like I'm stuck.
hey i tried logging in but it says my account is locked? no idea why. can you help me with this?
so I tried to log in with my new account but it says my username doesn’t exist? I thought I did everything right, even confirmed the email. help?
Hey, I was trying to log in but I forgot my user name or something. Not sure what to do now.

I am encountering a significant issue with my account due to a missplaced verification code that seems to be causing a lockout. Could you assist me in unlocking my account, as I am unable to access my information? This is quite urgent, and I seem to have exhausted all options myself.

I've been having issues with my order. First, it was supposed to arrive last week, but then it got delayed. I even checked the tracking link and it says it’s still in transit! And honestly, this is just soooo frustrating because I had plans based on when it was supposed to get here. Also, I ordered a couple of extra items that were supposed to be included but I don't see them in my order history anymore. Can someone please tell me what's going on? This is just out of hand, really.

So, I was trying to log into my account, and I remembered my password, but then I thought, wait, did I even set the email correctly? Like, I might've used my old email that's linked to my old job, which was ages ago! Can you even still find that account? Also, do I need to send you a picture of my cat for verification? It's kinda silly, I know, but I really just want to make sure I get back in without getting lost in more confusion. Thanks!

Hey there! I was wondering if you have any plans to offer a self-hosted option for your service. I mean, is it always going to be cloud-based only? I think a lot of us would prefer having that flexibility, especially for privacy reasons and stuff like that.
